## The World’s Leading Independent AI Education & Discovery Platform

Futurepedia is the largest independent ecosystem for AI discovery, education, and professional adoption. Across Futurepedia, Skill Leap, and the Howfinity YouTube network, **we serve millions of professionals, founders, and operators navigating the shift to AI-powered work**.

Our platform reaches millions of website visitors, 2 million+ YouTube subscribers, and hundreds of thousands of subscribers, making Futurepedia one of the most influential AI media and learning properties on the web.

We operate the world’s first [AI tool directory](https://www.futurepedia.io/ai-tools), featuring 4,000+ curated tools and 500,000 plus accounts, alongside a rapidly growing [AI education platform](https://skillleap.futurepedia.io/) with [29 courses](https://www.futurepedia.io/courses) and over 1,000 lessons focused on real-world AI skills for business and productivity, including our [14-Day AI Boot Camp](https://www.futurepedia.io/courses/14-day-ai-boot-camp), a practical, step-by-step course designed to help you master essential AI skills in just two weeks.

Futurepedia has become the default onramp for anyone serious about understanding, evaluating, and applying AI in their work.
